name: snapshot
description: Extract frames from a video: grid contact sheet (default), all frames (--frames all), or single frame at a timestamp (--at <sec>).

output.description: JPEG image — contact sheet (grid mode) or single frame (--at mode), or a directory path followed by frame list (all-frames mode).

params.name: start
params.description: Window start in seconds (grid / all-frames mode)

params.name: end
params.description: Window end in seconds (grid / all-frames mode)

params.name: frames
params.description: Number of frames to sample (grid mode), or 'all' to extract every frame in the window

params.name: at
params.description: Extract a single full-resolution frame at this timestamp (seconds). Mutually exclusive with --frames, --cols, --rows, --start, --end. Used for boundary-frame extraction: scene continuity (Kling --first-frame / --last-frame) and regen stitching.

params.name: out
params.description: Output file path (grid / --at modes) or directory (all-frames mode). Defaults to <input>_snapshot.jpg / <input>_at_<sec>.jpg / <input>_frames/.
